name: pseudoephedrine
effects: traditionally used for asthma and weight loss
description: pseudoephedrine is a compound reported in nan. Available references are still early and incomplete.
summary: pseudoephedrine is a compound reported in nan. Available references are still early and incomplete.
mechanism: Ephedrine alkaloids act as mixed sympathomimetics, directly stimulating alpha- and beta-adrenergic receptors and indirectly increasing synaptic norepinephrine.
